unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match the words with the photos: 1 bicycle.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bi (双) + cycle (圆/圈)：两个轮子的圆圈，就是自行车。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sometimes I take the bus.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bus (巴士)：发音像“巴士”，大众的巴士。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She travelled by boat to the Caribbean.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bo (博) + at (在)：博击在水面上的就是小船boat。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match the words with the photos: 4 car.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: car (卡)：发音像“卡”，卡车是车，小车也是car。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There are times when planes are a necessity.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: p (跑) + lane (车道)：在跑道上跑了之后飞起来的就是飞机plane。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She's taken a train across Canada.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: tr (拽) + ain (在)：拽着一串车厢在跑的就是火车train。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I've decided to write about travel.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: tr (他人) + a + vel (威尔)：和他人威尔一起去旅行travel。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But then she made a big decision.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: de (抵) + ci (制) + sion (名词后缀)：抵制诱惑，做出决定decision。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Her dream was to travel the world.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dr (大人) + eam (爱美)：大人也爱美，因为他们有梦想dream。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So she sold her business and got rid of her belongings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: be (是) + long (长久的) + ings：属于你的长久的东西就是财物belongings。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: but of course there are times when planes are a necessity.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ne (哪) + ces (厕) + si (死) + ty：哪里没厕所真要急死人，厕所是生活必需品necessity。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She's worked for her accommodation in Hawaii.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ac + com (一起) + mod (模式) + a + tion：大家在一起住的模式就是住宿accommodation。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She's had a lot of fantastic adventures.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ad (增加) + venture (风险)：增加一点风险，就是冒险adventure。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some of her experiences have not been easy ones.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ex (向外) + per (每一个) + i + ence：向外接触每一个东西的积累就是经历experience。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: after a cyclone hit their countries.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: cy (赛) + clone (克隆)：赛跑中克隆出的龙卷风，就是气旋cyclone。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Travel broadens the mind.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: broad (宽阔的) + en (使动后缀)：使宽阔，即拓宽broaden。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: learning about other cultures
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: cul (咖) + ture (去)：大家去喝咖（啡），是一种生活文化culture。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 可怕的，令人厌恶的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Have you ever eaten anything really horrible?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: hor (吼) + ri (哩) + ble：吼得你心里哩哩啦啦地害怕，真的很可怕horrible。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Has anything really bad ever happened to you, like an accident?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ac + ci (洗) + dent (凹痕)：洗车时发现车身上有凹痕，那是出了事故accident。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Tourists take suitcases with them.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: suit (西装) + case (盒子)：装西装的盒子，就是手提箱suitcase。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: travellers take backpacks.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: back (背) + pack (包裹)：背在背上的包裹，就是背包backpack。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Nora is a professional world traveller.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pro (向前) + fess (说) + ion + al：在大家面前专业地演说，就是专业的professional。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Someone who travels to many different places.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dif (地) + fer (福) + ent：地理环境不同带来的福气也不同different。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: an incredible journey.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in (不) + cred (相信) + ible (能够)：不能够相信的，即难以置信的incredible。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: travel doesn't have to be expensive.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ex (向外) + pen (盆) + sive：向外端了两个盆才买得起，说明很贵expensive。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Her dream was to travel the world.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: travel the world vs around the world
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: travel (旅行) + world (世界)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But then she made a big decision.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: make a decision vs make a mistake
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: make (做) + decision (决定)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So she sold her business and got rid of her belongings.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: get rid of vs get tired of
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: get (得到) + rid (摆脱) + of。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She works to earn enough money to have a good time.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: earn (挣得) + money (钱)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Travel broadens the mind.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: broaden the mind vs change the mind
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: broaden (拓宽) + mind (头脑)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He wants to get married and start a family.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: start a family vs start a business
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: start (开始) + family (家庭)。
